Hey guys, I'm here to talk about some frequently asked questions about intro workout. Question number one, how much should I take? Just take one serving. That's all you need. That's how it was formulated. Pretty straightforward. Number two, when? Daily versus weekly, etc. Just take this on days you train. That's all you need. You do not need to make expensive water out of this stuff. Just take it on days you train. How should you take it? You should take it with as much fluid as you need to make the flavor match whatever your palate desires. That's probably the most straightforward way in terms of how much fluid. Okay? And then just start sipping really essentially when you finish your pre- workout drink. That's probably the easiest way to go about it. So this is what you want to consume like instead of Gatorade while you're training. Consume this. Okay? Do you have to cycle this product? Absolutely not. You can take this every time you train. No problem. Number five, what happens if you skip? Can you double up the dose? Absolutely. It won't hurt you. Is it necessary? No. So just hop back on the wagon the next time you train.
